title: Sysmon Kerberoasting Network Indicator
description: Detects Kerberos ticket requests (port 88) from anomalous processes. Kerberoasting attacks request service tickets (TGS) to crack service account passwords offline.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and (('Destination Port' = 88 and Initiated = 'true') and (('Process Name' like '*\rubeus.exe' or 'Process Name' like '*\powershell.exe' or 'Process Name' like '*\mimikatz.exe' or 'Process Name' like '*\GetUserSPNs.py' or 'Process Name' like '*\python.exe' or 'Process Name' like '*\python3.exe')))
